scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "pnpm --filter api dev" "pnpm --filter web dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter shared build && pnpm --filter api build && pnpm --filter web build
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm --filter api exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:push: pnpm --filter api exec prisma db push
scripts.db:seed: pnpm --filter api exec prisma db seed
